  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8

    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)

    (on-table b10)

    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)

    (arm-empty)

      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: b1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4 (height 1)
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b5 (height 1)
    (on-table b5)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 6: b6, b7, b8, b9 (height 4, b6 on table)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 7: b10, b11, b12, b13 (height 4, b10 on table)
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
    
    ;; Arm state
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1: b1 inverted (still on table, still height 1)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2: b2 inverted (still on table, still height 1)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3: b3 inverted (still on table, still height 1)

    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 2): b6 on table, b7 on b6
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 2): b8 on table, b9 on b8
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 7 (height 2): b10 on table, b11 on b10

    (on b11 b10)
